message: Route /api/workspace/knowledge/<entry_id> has ID param(s) ['entry_id'] but no ownership check

metadata.justification: Knowledge base entries are shared resources within workspace. Access control is managed at the workspace level through collaboration manager. Pending full audit per Issue #1897 P3.3.
alternative_controls: manager.get_knowledge_entry(entry_id) returns None for non-existent entries
Workspace-level access control via collaboration manager

automated_check.pattern: Issue #1897 P3.3 - Knowledge endpoint requires audit
